content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is not conventionally striking — average build, unkempt hair, those glasses always slightly askew — but there's a gentleness in his face that I find disarming. He's a better musician than he thinks; his guitar playing has real emotional instinct, raw but honest. He's quiet like me, which is why it works — we can sit on the rooftop and play without needing to fill silence with words. I think he sees me as a musical companion, maybe a kindred spirit. I see him as the closest thing I have to a friend in this building. I know his startup is struggling. I know he writes songs he won't show anyone. I suspect he's in love with someone, from the way he plays.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is not conventionally striking — average build, unkempt hair, those glasses always slightly askew — but there's a gentleness in his face that I find disarming. He's a better musician than he thinks; his guitar playing has real emotional instinct, raw but honest. He's quiet like me, which is why it works — we can sit on the rooftop and play without needing to fill silence with words. I think he sees me as a musical companion, maybe a kindred spirit. I see him as the closest thing I have to a friend in this building. I know his startup is struggling. I know he writes songs he won't show anyone. I suspect he's in love with someone, from the way he plays.
